title: Hyper Realistic Exploded Vertical Infographic
sourceTitle: Premium Beverage Product Photograph Mango Smoothie Tall
prompt:
A premium beverage product photograph of a mango smoothie in a tall transparent glass centered against a bright tropical yellow seamless studio background. The smoothie has a rich creamy mango texture with fresh mango slices garnish, condensation droplets, and vibrant color. Soft commercial lighting creates clean reflections and realistic shadows beneath the glass. Ultra-sharp focus, premium beverage advertisement style, hyper realistic, 8K.
Aspect Ratio: 1:1

Image 2 Prompt: Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of a mango smoothie.
Top → Bottom structure:
Cream Foam Layer (light airy cream texture)
→ Mango Puree Layer (rich vibrant mango texture)
→ Fresh Mango Chunks (juicy fruit detail)
→ Ice Cube Layer (clear realistic ice texture)
→ Glass Base (minimal transparent glass)
Perfect alignment, tropical yellow background, soft realistic shadows, premium beverage infographic design.
Add clean infographic text labels with thin pointer lines using these exact labels:
“Cream”
“Mango Puree”
“Mango”
“Ice”
“Glass”
Ultra-realistic drink detail, premium commercial photography, 8K.
Aspect Ratio: 1:1
